originContent: > The main contributor of this repo is a Master's student graduating in 2026, feel free to reach out for collaboration or opportunities.
translatedContent: > Il principale contributore di questo repository è uno studente magistrale che si laureerà nel 2026, sentiti libero di contattare per collaborazioni o opportunità.

originContent: > 本仓库的主要贡献者是一名 2026 届硕士毕业生，欢迎联系合作或交流机会。
translatedContent: > 本仓库的主要贡献者是一名 2026 届硕士毕业生，欢迎联系合作或交流机会。

originContent: - [2026/03]: We now support CLI and have released our fine-tuned models on [Hugging Face 🤗](https://huggingface.co/collections/ICIP/deeppresenter)!
translatedContent: - [2026/03]: Ora supportiamo la CLI e abbiamo rilasciato i nostri modelli ottimizzati su [Hugging Face 🤗](https://huggingface.co/collections/ICIP/deeppresenter)!

originContent: - [2026/01]: We support freeform and template generation support PPTX export, offline mode now! Context management is added to avoid context overflow.
translatedContent: - [2026/01]: Supportiamo la generazione libera e tramite template, esportazione PPTX, ora anche in modalità offline! La gestione del contesto è stata aggiunta per evitare overflow di contesto.

originContent: - [2025/12]: 🔥 Released V2 with major improvements - Deep Research Integration, Free-Form Visual Design, Autonomous Asset Creation, Text-to-Image Generation, and Agent Environment with sandbox & 20+ tools.
translatedContent: - [2025/12]: 🔥 Rilasciata la V2 con miglioramenti significativi - Integrazione Profonda della Ricerca, Design Visivo Libero, Creazione Autonoma di Risorse, Generazione Testo-immagine e Ambiente Agent con sandbox e 20+ strumenti.

originContent: - [2025/09]: 🛠️ MCP server support added - see [MCP Server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/PPTAgent/DOC.md#mcp-server-) for configuration details
translatedContent: - [2025/09]: 🛠️ Aggiunto il supporto al server MCP - vedi [MCP Server](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/PPTAgent/DOC.md#mcp-server-) per dettagli sulla configurazione

originContent: - [2025/09]: 🚀 Released v2 with major improvements - see [release notes](https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/releases/tag/v0.2.0) for details
translatedContent: - [2025/09]: 🚀 Rilasciata la v2 con importanti miglioramenti - vedi [note di rilascio](https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/releases/tag/v0.2.0) per dettagli

originContent: - [2025/05]: ✨ Released v1 with core functionality and 🌟 breakthrough: reached 1,000 stars on GitHub! - see [release notes](https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/releases/tag/v0.1.0) for details
translatedContent: - [2025/05]: ✨ Rilasciata la v1 con funzionalità principali e 🌟 traguardo: raggiunte 1.000 stelle su GitHub! - vedi [note di rilascio](https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/releases/tag/v0.1.0) per dettagli

originContent: - [2025/01]: 🔓 Open-sourced the codebase, with experimental code archived at [experiment release](https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/releases/tag/experiment)
translatedContent: - [2025/01]: 🔓 Codice reso open-source, con codice sperimentale archiviato alla [release sperimentale](https://github.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/releases/tag/experiment)

originContent: > Windows is not supported. If you are on Windows, please use WSL.
translatedContent: > Windows non è supportato. Se usi Windows, utilizza WSL.

originContent: > We strongly recommend starting with the CLI and minimum task to confirm dependencies and environment is configured correctly.
translatedContent: > Raccomandiamo vivamente di iniziare con la CLI e il task minimo per confermare che le dipendenze e l’ambiente siano configurati correttamente.

originContent: If you use the CLI, `pptagent onboard` can help create and update these configurations interactively. If you use Docker Compose or build from source, you should prepare them manually:
translatedContent: Se utilizzi la CLI, `pptagent onboard` può aiutare a creare e aggiornare queste configurazioni in modo interattivo. Se usi Docker Compose o compili dal sorgente, dovrai prepararle manualmente:
#### Servizi opzionali che migliorano la qualità

originContent: The following services can noticeably improve generation quality, especially for research depth, PDF parsing, and visual asset creation:
translatedContent: I seguenti servizi possono migliorare sensibilmente la qualità della generazione, soprattutto per la profondità della ricerca, l'analisi dei PDF e la creazione di asset visivi:

originContent: - **Tavily**: improves web search quality. Apply for an API key at [tavily.com](https://www.tavily.com/), then set `TAVILY_API_KEY` in [`deeppresenter/mcp.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/mcp.json).
translatedContent: - **Tavily**: migliora la qualità della ricerca web. Richiedi una chiave API su [tavily.com](https://www.tavily.com/), poi imposta `TAVILY_API_KEY` in [`deeppresenter/mcp.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/mcp.json).

originContent: - **MinerU**: improves PDF parsing quality. You can either apply for an API key at [mineru.net](https://mineru.net/apiManage/docs) and set `MINERU_API_KEY` in [`deeppresenter/mcp.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/mcp.json), or deploy MinerU locally and set `MINERU_API_URL` instead.
translatedContent: - **MinerU**: migliora la qualità dell'analisi dei PDF. Puoi richiedere una chiave API su [mineru.net](https://mineru.net/apiManage/docs) e impostare `MINERU_API_KEY` in [`deeppresenter/mcp.json`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/mcp.json), oppure installare MinerU localmente e impostare invece `MINERU_API_URL`.

originContent: - **Text-to-image model**: improves image generation quality. Configure `t2i_model` in [`deeppresenter/config.yaml`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/config.yaml).
translatedContent: - **Modello text-to-image**: migliora la qualità della generazione delle immagini. Configura `t2i_model` in [`deeppresenter/config.yaml`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/config.yaml).

originContent: If you want a fully offline setup, deploy MinerU locally and set `offline_mode: true` in `deeppresenter/config.yaml` to avoid loading network-dependent tools such as web search.
translatedContent: Se desideri una configurazione completamente offline, installa MinerU localmente e imposta `offline_mode: true` in `deeppresenter/config.yaml` per evitare il caricamento di strumenti dipendenti dalla rete come la ricerca web.

originContent: More configurable variables can be found in [constants.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/utils/constants.py).
translatedContent: Altre variabili configurabili sono disponibili in [constants.py](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/icip-cas/PPTAgent/main/deeppresenter/utils/constants.py).

originContent: > On macOS, the CLI may automatically install several local dependencies, including Homebrew, Node.js, Docker, poppler, Playwright, and llama.cpp.
translatedContent: > Su macOS, la CLI potrebbe installare automaticamente diverse dipendenze locali, inclusi Homebrew, Node.js, Docker, poppler, Playwright e llama.cpp.

originContent: > On Linux, you should prepare the environment by yourself.
translatedContent: > Su Linux, dovrai preparare l'ambiente autonomamente.

originContent: Use this mode if you want the fastest local setup or want to plug DeepPresenter into OpenClaw through the CLI.
translatedContent: Usa questa modalità se vuoi la configurazione locale più rapida o se vuoi collegare DeepPresenter a OpenClaw tramite CLI.

translatedContent: Usa questa modalità se desideri il livello di astrazione più piccolo e il pieno controllo sulle dipendenze durante lo sviluppo.

originContent: Use this mode for a stable server environment with explicit dependencies.
translatedContent: Utilizza questa modalità per un ambiente server stabile con dipendenze esplicite.

originContent: If you find this project helpful, please use the following to cite it:
translatedContent: Se trovi utile questo progetto, utilizza quanto segue per citarlo:

originContent: title = "{PPTA}gent: Generating and Evaluating Presentations Beyond Text-to-Slides",
translatedContent: title = "{PPTA}gent: Generating and Evaluating Presentations Beyond Text-to-Slides",

originContent: booktitle = "Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing",
translatedContent: booktitle = "Proceedings of the 2025 Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing",

originContent: abstract = "Automatically generating presentations from documents is a challenging task that requires accommodating content quality, visual appeal, and structural coherence. Existing methods primarily focus on improving and evaluating the content quality in isolation, overlooking visual appeal and structural coherence, which limits their practical applicability. To address these limitations, we propose PPTAgent, which comprehensively improves presentation generation through a two-stage, edit-based approach inspired by human workflows. PPTAgent first analyzes reference presentations to extract slide-level functional types and content schemas, then drafts an outline and iteratively generates editing actions based on selected reference slides to create new slides. To comprehensively evaluate the quality of generated presentations, we further introduce PPTEval, an evaluation framework that assesses presentations across three dimensions: Content, Design, and Coherence. Results demonstrate that PPTAgent significantly outperforms existing automatic presentation generation methods across all three dimensions."
translatedContent: abstract = "Automatically generating presentations from documents is a challenging task that requires accommodating content quality, visual appeal, and structural coherence. Existing methods primarily focus on improving and evaluating the content quality in isolation, overlooking visual appeal and structural coherence, which limits their practical applicability. To address these limitations, we propose PPTAgent, which comprehensively improves presentation generation through a two-stage, edit-based approach inspired by human workflows. PPTAgent first analyzes reference presentations to extract slide-level functional types and content schemas, then drafts an outline and iteratively generates editing actions based on selected reference slides to create new slides. To comprehensively evaluate the quality of generated presentations, we further introduce PPTEval, an evaluation framework that assesses presentations across three dimensions: Content, Design, and Coherence. Results demonstrate that PPTAgent significantly outperforms existing automatic presentation generation methods across all three dimensions."
